creator: empty.japan
caption:
Hey guys, long time no see ❤️
I hope you’re having a great holiday season!

Since this is my last post of the year, I wanted to share something big - I just bought land in the mountains of Nagano! It still feels a bit surreal, and that’s why I haven’t been as active here lately - so much has been happening behind the scenes.

I plan to build a house, and it’s going to be a long journey, but I’m really excited to share it with you next year. As well as more hidden gems, new adventures, and deeper dives into Japanese culture - the things we all love and can’t get enough of!

As the year comes to an end, I know it’s been different for everyone - whether it’s been a good one or a tough one, I hope 2025 brings you plenty of good days and exciting moments to look forward to.

Thank you for being here - for every comment and message. It means more than I can ever put into words.

Merry Christmas and Happy New Year! ❤️

transcription.text: បំជិ...បំមីដំ វេ្ពើរុទីរមំ, កẻរ្ងានាប់ប់ស៍។ ត្មីុំពាន់កានាមិ, នុនាឡេប់, កំឧបែនុេឡ bolt ។
